# Muneer Puthiya Purayil — mpurayil.com

> SaaS architect and AI systems engineer with 10+ years shipping production infrastructure. Specializing in scalable architecture, agentic AI systems, and enterprise mobile.

## Site Overview

This is the personal website and technical journal of Muneer Puthiya Purayil, a Dubai-based SaaS architect. The site contains:

- **Technical Journal** (`/blog`): 250+ in-depth articles on software architecture, agentic AI, DevOps, system design, SaaS engineering, mobile engineering, and scalability. Articles include guides, tutorials, comparisons, best practices, and case studies.
- **Portfolio** (`/portfolio`): Case studies from production systems including $4B automotive platforms, banking systems with sub-0.1% crash rates, and enterprise SaaS.
- **Website Templates** (`/templates`): 14 production-ready website templates for salons, e-commerce, Shopify stores, and more.
- **Open Source** (`/open-source`): Open-source TypeScript libraries for mobile app generation, SaaS architecture, and enterprise engineering.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://mpurayil.com
- Blog Index: https://mpurayil.com/blog
- Portfolio: https://mpurayil.com/portfolio
- Templates: https://mpurayil.com/templates
- Open Source: https://mpurayil.com/open-source
- Sitemap: https://mpurayil.com/sitemap.xml

## Blog Categories

- AI Architecture
- SaaS Architecture
- SaaS Engineering
- System Design
- DevOps
- Scalability
- Mobile Engineering
- Mobile/Frontend

## Article Types

- Guides: Comprehensive deep-dives on specific technologies and patterns
- Tutorials: Step-by-step implementation walkthroughs with code examples
- Comparisons: Balanced evaluations of tools, frameworks, and approaches
- Best Practices: Production-tested patterns and conventions
- Case Studies: Real-world implementation stories from production systems

## Author

Muneer Puthiya Purayil
- Role: SaaS Architect & AI Systems Engineer
- Location: Dubai, UAE

## Content Licensing

All blog content is original and written by Muneer Puthiya Purayil. Content may be cited with attribution.

## Structured Data

All pages include JSON-LD structured data (Schema.org). Blog posts use TechArticle, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, and HowTo schemas. The site includes Person, WebSite, and ProfessionalService schemas.
